title: Asymptotic Time, Space, and Growth
description: Predict which ingestion design survives tenfold and thousandfold load increases. Learners cumulatively produce a measured growth-rate decision notebook through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Define input size and dominant operations for scalar, sequence, graph, and numeric problems.
Distinguish upper, tight, and lower asymptotic bounds without dropping relevant variables.
Simplify sums, products, and nested-loop costs while preserving independent dimensions.
